message:
Command `# ANTENNA CHECK DONE (process ended). Log shows it ran check_antennas!
# The %OL_CREATE_REPORT line indicates antenna report was created.
# Let's check what happened (did it succeed or fail?)
cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log | tail -30` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# ANTENNA CHECK DONE (process ended). Log shows it ran check_antennas!
# The %OL_CREATE_REPORT line indicates antenna report was created.
# Let's check what happened (did it succeed or fail?)
cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log | tail -30"}

extras.command:
# ANTENNA CHECK DONE (process ended). Log shows it ran check_antennas!
# The %OL_CREATE_REPORT line indicates antenna report was created.
# Let's check what happened (did it succeed or fail?)
cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log | tail -30
